RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration, Clinic A Pilot
Date: 2026-04-15

RISKS
R1 | Vendor API v2 deprecation in 90 days (sunset 2026-07-10)
    Trigger: Vendor EOL email 2026-03-28
    Impact: HIGH — patient-lookup + insurance-eligibility endpoints break
    Likelihood: HIGH (vendor confirmed; no extension)
    Owner: Project team
    Mitigation: Approved $18k vendor PS migration spike; SOW signed 2026-04-14;
               kickoff 2026-05-14, 4-week estimated duration; cutover dry-run
               scheduled 2026-06-12. Backup migration plan: in-house port if PS
               slips, est. 6 weeks.

R2 | Premature scope expansion (Clinics B + C before stabilization)
    Trigger: PO ask 2026-04-12
    Impact: HIGH — destabilizes pilot KPIs
    Likelihood: MEDIUM
    Owner: Project team
    Mitigation: Staged rollout plan accepted by steering 2026-04-08; gating
               criteria: uptime ≥99.5%, P1 incidents = 0 for 14 consecutive
               days. Daily KPI dashboard in place; weekly steering update.

R3 | Coverage gap during lead engineer paternity leave (4 weeks)
    Impact: MEDIUM
    Likelihood: CERTAIN
    Owner: Eng team
    Mitigation: Cross-trained backup engineer 2026-04-04 to 2026-04-12; on-call
               rotation activated 2026-04-15; runbook updated with two-week
               on-call window.

ISSUES
I1 | HL7 lab feed dropping 2-3x/week since 2026-04-02
    Owner: IT Ops
    Action: Auto-retry deployed 2026-04-09 (reduced drops by ~40%); vendor
           diagnostic call scheduled 2026-04-17; interim manual reconciliation
           by clinical team end-of-day until resolved. Target close 2026-04-30.

ASSUMPTIONS
A1 | Vendor PS team will hit 2026-06-12 dry-run date for v2 migration.
    Owner: Project team
    Validation: Weekly status check with vendor PM; first check 2026-05-21.

DEPENDENCIES
D1 | Vendor v2 migration (linked R1)
    Coordination: weekly status; escalate to vendor account exec if any
                 milestone slips.
